---
applyTo: '**/*.css'
---
# CSS Instructions

- Keep layout and presentation in CSS rather than inline HTML styles or JavaScript-generated style strings.
- When visual cleanup starts, move shared colors, borders, spacing, and radii into semantic custom properties.
- Preserve the spectrogram app's wide canvas-first composition unless the task explicitly changes layout.
- Reuse shared tokens before adding new constants.
- Keep property ordering readable and consistent across rules.
